case_title: CREDITORS BUREAU USA VS. JUSTIN WILLIAMS ET AL

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS BUREAU USA AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, JUSTIN AKA JUSTIN J.
